message:
🐛 Fix event count mismatch between Event Streams card and stat blocks (#156)

Events dashboard used useEvents(limit=20) while EventStream card used
useCachedEvents(limit=100), causing stat blocks to show stale/lower
counts than the card.

Fix: Switch Events dashboard to useCachedEvents with the same limit=100,
sharing the same cache and data source as EventStream. Derive warning
events client-side from the full event set instead of a separate API call.

When the event count hits the fetch limit, display "100+" to indicate
there may be more events than shown.

Also increase useUniversalStats event limit from 20 to 100.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
